raw_consumer_statement:
I contacted Citibank ( XXXX XXXX XXXX ) to dispute only a fraudulent charge made by a third-party travel agency that improperly modified my flight. I explicitly instructed Citibank not to dispute the XXXX XXXX charge, which represented my valid airline ticket. 

Despite these instructions, Citibank incorrectly disputed valid XXXX XXXX transactions. As a direct result of this payment reversal, XXXX XXXX voided my confirmed return flight, leaving me without a return ticket shortly before travel. 

My original ticket included a return flight scheduled for XX/XX/year>, which was active and confirmed prior to the dispute. XXXX XXXX has since provided official ticket history confirming that the return segments were marked RF-REFUNDED ( voided ) and not flown. I did not cancel the ticket, and the airline did not cancel it for operational reasons. 

Because the cancellation occurred close to the travel date, I had no reasonable alternative and was forced to repurchase the return ticket at a cost of {$1100.00} USD. The only amount returned in connection with the original ticket was {$190.00}, which represented a fare adjustment and not the value of the return flight. 

I contacted Citibank customer service and the fraud/dispute department multiple times to request correction of the dispute error and reimbursement for the replacement ticket. I was told there was nothing they could do, and no resolution was provided. 

This financial loss occurred solely because Citibank disputed a valid airline charge against my instructions, causing the ticket to be voided.
